title: calicotome spinosa subsp. hispanica
intro: Calicotome spinosa subsp. hispanica, also known as the Spanish broom, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calicotome spinosa subsp. hispanica include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are used in traditional medicine to create various remedies.
